fixture_name: Stale False Positive — Aggregate Zero Counter Deception
description: A stale verification report claims PASS with all_zero=true and nonzero_count=0, but the preserved coefficient association contains exact nonzero terms. This demonstrates that PASS/all_zero/nonzero_count fields cannot override executable coefficient evidence.

expected_adjudication.explanation: PASS/all_zero/nonzero_count fields are forbidden standalone evidence. When fresh executable replay shows nonzero terms, the stale report is rejected regardless of its PASS signal.

stale_detection.stale_reason: fresh executable replay reports nonzero residual while stale structured summary reports PASS with all_zero
